articles.title: Israeli strikes kill at least five people in Gaza on Monday

"Three people were killed and several injured when an Israeli drone struck a group of civilians," Al-Aqsa Hospital said in a statement, adding that one of the victims was a child aged eight years old. Gaza's civil defence agency said the strike hit an area in Deir el-Balah in central Gaza. An Israeli military source confirmed the attack.
